title: [trustless://interop.landscape] Doris Hernandez - Keystore Layer: Enabling secure, interop wallets
description:
In this talk, Doris Hernandez (Functor, Co-Founder & CEO) introduces the keystore layer, how it makes wallets interoperable by standardizing authentication across chains, and how it delivers UX Security through programmable policies. She talks about how the keystore infrastructure enables native recovery, safer automation, and faster adoption of smart accounts.

Talk given during day 2 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
